title: Diane D996 Makeup Cosmetic Spatulas, 5 Inch - 12 Count (Pack of 1)
description:
Color: white
Set of 12 Pack
5" makeup spatulas
5"
reviews_5s:
Delivered quickly. Product is exactly as described. Worked out great for mea lot bigger than what I needed, but all the other options were hundreds of spatulas and I needed... 3. So I got this. They're like little paddles - really too big for some of my containers, but handy and reusable. I use then to mix home remedies and products such as creams, enzyme scrubs, moisturizers, and homemade toothpaste. Will still look for something smaller as I like to use spatulas instead of my fingers to remove products from jars, and these are too big.Good value for the money. Strong plastic spatulas that can be reused. Will last you a long timeI love these. I reordered when I was down to my last one and I was giving it heavy use. It’s the best tool to remove labels after you have soaked them for a while in hot soapy water. Of course I use them to remove cream from my beauty jars so I keep the getting germs in the product from using my hands. I also use them for mixing different beauty ingredients together. This is a real workhorse of a tool for me. It’s a lot sturdier than it looks.I like to use these when mixing epoxy resin. They can easily be cleaned and reused or you can toss them if you don't feel like cleaning them. They aren't too expensive so you don't have to feel bad if you do toss them out after a few uses. Shipping was very fast! Will be happy to order from again.These are awesome for getting creams out of the jar or my coconut oil. Steardy reusable puce of plastic, glad I got the bigger ones. No I don't get product or lotion under my nails or bacteria from my fingers in my product!All I have to say is perfect! These Spatulas are perfect for mixing colors for any craft type thing you do. I use them for mixing soap colors. What I like most is that they are flat so when I wipe on the side of the cup you can get just about every drop off. Handle is the perfect length too. Will be ordering more of these babies. I have someone in the house that will steal these from me for his own projects. :) thank youKnow what’s gross? Sticking your bare fingers into expensive night cream & then having to scrape said cream out from under your fingernails. Do yourself a favor and spend a few $ on these. Your manicure with thank you.As expected. I am using for all of my creams that come in those little tubs; night cream, lotion. I haven't tried scraping out a bottle with it, which is why I bought the long handled ones. I imagine it will work well. Made of hard plastic.I was tired of shaking my makeup bottle turning it upside down to get the last drops out, I was looking for a small spatula and came upon this item
I love it not shaking and no more turning the bottle over, I recommend this item, I think you will be greatly
reviews_1s:
The length of the spatula is perfect but the width ( "scoop" side) is too big. It didn't fit into any of the foundation bottle (for which I had bought this in the first place). If you are okay with using the bottom end to scoop up whatever you bought it for, this is fine. Otherwise not a very effective product.

I had initially bought this to scoop up my foundation makeup and transfer it into another container but the spatula could not fit into ANY of my makeup bottles

VERDICT: Perfect length, horrible width. Choose wisely
